displayTitle: Calculate the Shot, Verify the Field

beats.narration: At Level Two, you set the amperage and sign for the result. Time to put numbers on flux theory.

payload.title: CALCULATE THE SHOT
payload.sub: Flux theory you can put numbers on.

beats.narration: In a solid bar, the field is zero at the center, strongest at the surface. A hollow bore sees almost nothing: run a central conductor.

payload.heading: Where the field is — and isn't

beats.narration: Three rules: head shots, amperes per inch of diameter. Coil shots, forty-five thousand divided by L over D. Prods, amperes per inch of spacing.
Sixteen inches long, two inches across: L over D is eight. Forty-five thousand over eight: about fifty-six hundred ampere-turns. Five turns: roughly eleven hundred amperes.

payload.heading: The L/D rule, start to finish

beats.narration: A formula can't see a worn cable. Prove the field with a shim and gaussmeter. Calculate the shot, then verify it.

payload.sub: The QQI shim and the gaussmeter are the proof.
